C89-P1.detail: polygonOffset=true, polygonOffsetFactor=-1, polygonOffsetUnits=-1 applied to cloned tileMat inside mur_pierre.glb loader. Correctly placed after material clone (line 118), preventing shared-ref pollution.

C89-P2.detail: setupLighting(scene, lowEnd=false) signature confirmed. isLowEndMobile regex /Android|iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(navigator.userAgent) && window.devicePixelRatio>=2 confirmed at line 696. backAccent PointLight skipped when lowEnd=true (lines 650-654). fill intensity 0.4 -> 0.55 (+0.15) on lowEnd confirmed (line 648). Call site passes isLowEndMobile at line 697.

flat_shading_coherence.rationale: No change to flatShading flags. All procedural and GLB materials retain flatShading:true. Stable.

z_fighting_residual.rationale: C89-P1 adds polygonOffset on InstancedMesh tile material. Factor=-1/Units=-1 is the correct negative-push convention for overlapping coplanar geometry on Mali-G57/Adreno 610 16-bit depth buffers. sol_pierre.glb already uses +0.02 Y-offset; mur_pierre tile seams were the remaining source of z-fighting. Bump from 7 to 9 is warranted; residual risk is seam visibility at grazing angles (not eliminated, only suppressed).

material_quality.rationale: No new material changes. Clone-before-mutate pattern (C81-04) remains intact for all GLB paths.

lighting_dramatism.rationale: Desktop path unchanged: 5 sources (ambient + key + rim + fill + backAccent). C85-02 forward-angle key and ember backAccent preserved. Mobile path drops backAccent but compensates fill; dramaturgy slightly flattened on mobile but acceptable for budget constraints.

glb_coverage.rationale: Same 5 GLBs: cauldron, bougie, table_druidique, bibliotheque, sol_pierre, mur_pierre. No new assets added.

geometric_proportions.rationale: No geometry changes. InstancedMesh tile scale [4, ROW_H, 1] unchanged.

celtic_style.rationale: No new visual elements. Celtic atmosphere maintained through existing candles, crystal, door, and wall materials.

bundle_gzip.rationale: Three boolean conditionals and one regex added — negligible (<50 bytes pre-gzip). Bundle size unaffected.

fps_budget.rationale: C89-P2 mobile path confirmed: high-DPR Android/iOS devices drop from 5 to 4 PointLights. On Mali-G57/Adreno 610, each PointLight costs ~0.8ms/frame at 1080p. Removing backAccent recovers ~0.8ms, enabling stable 60fps on mid-range 2022 mobile hardware. Desktop path unchanged at 5 lights. Score 9 -> 9.5 for mobile path confirmation.

memory_leaks.rationale: tileGeo.clone() and tileMat.clone() create owned copies (line 117-118), correctly isolated from GLB cache. No additional disposables introduced without corresponding cleanup path. Existing dispose() in LairResult covers scene-level objects.

zone_feedback_aria.rationale: No UI/ARIA changes in either patch. Zone interaction system untouched.

game_feel_flow.rationale: No interaction or animation changes. Candle flicker, crystal pulse, hover emissive all unchanged.

celtic_immersion.rationale: Reduced z-fighting on wall tiles marginally improves immersion (no seam shimmer). Not enough to move the needle from 9; would need new content to reach 10.

top3_remaining_issues.issue: GLB candle clones (bougie.glb) traverse and clone per-mesh materials correctly, but the cloned THREE.MeshStandardMaterial instances have no emissiveIntensity baseline set — hover flicker can bleed if candleGroup is visible=false and GLB candles lack the baseEmissive guard applied to the cauldron path. No crash, but candle hover state may not restore correctly after rapid hover/unhover cycles on slow load.
top3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Mirror the cauldron pattern: set emissiveIntensity=0.0 explicitly on each bougie clone mesh after material.clone(), and register them in interactives[] with baseEmissive=0.

top3_remaining_issues.issue: The isLowEndMobile detection fires once at scene construction. If the user rotates a tablet from landscape to portrait (triggering devicePixelRatio change on some Android skins) after construction, the lighting budget is not re-evaluated. Not a runtime crash but can cause over-budget rendering after orientation change.
top3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Cache isLowEndMobile outside createMerlinLair and re-evaluate only on initial load, or add a note in the code that lighting is intentionally static post-init.

top3_remaining_issues.issue: polygonOffsetFactor=-1 / Units=-1 pushes tile geometry toward the camera (negative = pull toward viewer). For back-wall tiles viewed at near-parallel angles (camera pitch < 5 deg), this can cause tile edges to pop slightly in front of adjacent tiles rather than behind. Factor values of -1/-1 are the minimum; scenes with deeper perspective may need -2/-4.
top3_remaining_issues.recommendation: Empirically verify on device at farthest camera position (z~8, looking toward back wall). If seams still shimmer, increase to Factor=-2, Units=-4.

verdict.rationale: C89 composite 8.81/10 exceeds the 8.5 threshold. Both patches implemented correctly and precisely match spec. z_fighting_residual moves 7->9 (confirmed polygonOffset on cloned material, correct placement after clone). fps_budget moves 9->9.5 (mobile 4-light path confirmed, fill compensation +0.15 correct). No regressions detected. Top 3 issues are all MEDIUM or LOW severity and do not block shipping.
verdict.next_cycle_priority: Address candle hover emissive guard (rank-1 issue) in C90.
